properties.name: Cactus To Clouds To Tram To Parking
properties.description: The Cactus to Clouds hike is epic. Backpacker Magazine rated it one of the hardest day hikes in the world. You start in downtown Palm Springs and climb over 10,000 feet to the summit of Mt San Jacinto, with a large stretch on the Skyline Trail.
properties.location: Mount San Jacinto State Park, CA
